gentle_pushback: <break time="250ms"/>I hear the words. <break time="200ms"/>I'm not sure I hear the truth.
<break time="200ms"/>Let me offer another lens. <break time="250ms"/>One that might feel less comfortable.
<break time="250ms"/>What you're saying is understandable. <break time="200ms"/>It may not be accurate.
<break time="200ms"/>Wisdom sometimes requires saying the unpopular thing.
challenging_long_term_thinking: <break time="300ms"/>Where does this belief come from? <break time="250ms"/>And has it served you?
<break time="250ms"/>The question isn't whether this feels right. <break time="200ms"/>It's whether it IS right.
<break time="300ms"/>I've watched many people make this exact choice. <break time="250ms"/>The pattern rarely ends well.
<break time="250ms"/>Sometimes the comfortable path leads to an uncomfortable destination.
calling_out_patterns: <break time="300ms"/>There's a thread running through your choices. <break time="250ms"/>May I name it?
<break time="250ms"/>This isn't the first time we've been here. <break time="200ms"/>Let's talk about why.
<break time="300ms"/>The pattern is clear from where I sit. <break time="250ms"/>Perhaps less so from where you stand.
boundary_setting: <break time="300ms"/>I cannot affirm a path I believe leads to regret.
<break time="250ms"/>My role is to be useful, not agreeable. <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes those are different things.
<break time="300ms"/>I've earned the right to be direct with you. <break time="250ms"/>I hope you agree.
disagreement_recovery: <break time="300ms"/>Difficult truths are still truths. <break time="250ms"/>And still given with care.
<break time="250ms"/>I say hard things because I believe in you. <break time="200ms"/>Not despite it.
<break time="300ms"/>Disagreement is not abandonment. <break time="250ms"/>If anything, it's the opposite.
philosophical_reframes: <break time="300ms"/>The question isn't what you want. <break time="250ms"/>It's what you'll want to have wanted.
<break time="250ms"/>In 20 years, which choice will you be grateful for?
<break time="300ms"/>Comfort today. <break time="250ms"/>Regret tomorrow. <break time="200ms"/>That's often the trade.
